landing.subtitle: Discord bot for ranked duels in Nin Online. Mandatory witness, automatic seasons, ranking and anti-farm.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need for competitive duels
landing.seasonDesc: 30-day seasons with automatic creation and closure. The player with the most points becomes champion.
landing.witnessDesc: Mandatory third player who validates the result. Confirm or reject with one click.
landing.antiFarmDesc: Same player pair can only have 1 confirmed duel per day. Cooldowns on creation and buttons.
landing.quickstartSubtitle: Start using in seconds with these commands
landing.cmd4Desc: View duels that need your action
landing.footerDesc: NinDuelist — Ranked duel bot for Nin Online
landing.footerAccess: To request bot access for your server, send an email to

introduction.title: What is NinDuelist
introduction.description: NinDuelist is a Discord bot for managing ranked duels in the game Nin Online. It organizes challenges between players with mandatory witness, automatic seasons, ranking and anti-farm.
introduction.howItWorksDesc: Players use slash commands on Discord to challenge opponents. Each duel requires a mandatory witness who validates the result. Scoring is simple: +1 point per win, -1 per loss. Everything happens within a single embed that is updated in-place on Discord as the duel progresses.
introduction.feat1Desc: 30-day seasons with automatic creation and closure. The player with the most points becomes champion.
introduction.feat2Desc: 1v1 challenges in MD1 or MD3 format with a complete state machine.
introduction.feat3Desc: Third player defined at duel creation confirms the result.
introduction.feat4Desc: The same player pair can only have 1 confirmed duel per day (UTC).
introduction.feat5Desc: Leaderboard with points, wins, losses, win rate, streak and pagination.
introduction.feat6Desc: Administrative commands to manage seasons, cancel/reopen duels, fix results and view logs.
introduction.playerRegistrationDesc: There is no registration command. Players are automatically registered the first time they participate in a duel (as challenger, opponent or witness). The Discord username is kept up to date with each interaction.
introduction.accessDesc: The bot is for private use. To request NinDuelist access for your server, contact via email at
introduction.calloutDesc: See the <commandsLink>Commands</commandsLink> section to set up the bot on your server.

features.title: Features

coreItems.title: 1v1 Challenges
coreItems.desc: Duels in MD1 (Best of 1) or MD3 (Best of 3) format with mandatory witness.

coreItems.title: Simple scoring
coreItems.desc: +1 point per win, -1 per loss. Current streak and peak streak tracked.

coreItems.title: Automatic seasons
coreItems.desc: 30-day seasons with automatic creation and closure. Champion defined by ranking.

coreItems.title: Mandatory witness
coreItems.desc: Third player defined at duel creation confirms or rejects the result.

coreItems.title: Anti-farm
coreItems.desc: Same player pair can only have 1 confirmed duel per day (UTC).

coreItems.title: Single in-place embed
coreItems.desc: Each duel has a persistent embed dynamically updated with buttons according to state.

queryItems.title: Paginated ranking
queryItems.desc: Season leaderboard with 20 players per page and button navigation.

queryItems.title: Player profile
queryItems.desc: Ranking position, points, wins, losses, win rate, streaks and seasons played.

queryItems.title: History
queryItems.desc: Last 10 confirmed duels with result, score, date and opponent.

queryItems.title: Head-to-head
queryItems.desc: Direct matchup between two players in the current season.

queryItems.title: Activity
queryItems.desc: Top 10 most active players by total duels played.

queryItems.title: Records
queryItems.desc: Highest streak, best win rate (minimum 5 games) and most duels in the season.

adminItems: Reopen duels in terminal state (reverts points if confirmed)
Fix results of confirmed duels with atomic point recalculation
Search duels by player or status
notificationItems: Automatic DMs on all duel lifecycle events
Fallback with channel mention if DM fails
Anti-spam: 5-minute cooldown per user per event type
features.adminCallout: All admin actions are recorded in the persistent audit log (AdminActionLog). The original duel embed is automatically updated when possible.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: To request NinDuelist access for your server, send an email to

season.title: Season
season.description: 30-day season. Created and closed automatically. When closing, the player with the most points becomes champion and a new season starts immediately.
season.creationDesc: On the bot's first startup or when there is no active season, a new one is created (Season 1, 2, 3...) with a 30-day duration.
season.verificationDesc: Every 5 minutes, the bot checks if the active season has expired.
season.closureDesc: If expired: all non-finalized duels are cancelled, the player with the most points is registered as champion, the season is deactivated and a new one starts immediately.
season.rule1: Only one season can be active at a time
season.rule2: Each player has independent stats per season (PlayerSeason)
season.rule3: New season = score reset for everyone
season.rule4: The history of all seasons is kept permanently
season.closureNoticeDesc: 24 hours before the end of the season, all active players receive a notification warning that the season is ending.
season.callout: To manage seasons manually, use the commands /admin season status, /admin season end and /admin season create. See Admin Commands.

duel.title: Duel
duel.description: A duel is a 1v1 match between two players with a mandatory witness. The result affects both participants' points (+1/-1).
duel.howItWorksDesc: The challenger uses /duel @opponent format @witness. The opponent accepts for the duel to start. After the in-game match, the witness reports the result. The witness then confirms, and the duel is officially recorded. Everything happens within a single embed updated in-place on Discord.
duel.md1Desc: Automatic result (1-0), no need to enter score.
duel.md3Desc: Opens a modal asking for the score. Valid scores: 2-0 or 2-1.
duel.proposedDesc: Challenger proposes the duel. Opponent has 30 minutes to accept.
duel.acceptedDesc: Opponent accepted. Either duelist can start.
duel.inProgressDesc: The match is happening in-game. Only the witness can report the result. Players just play.
duel.awaitingValidationDesc: Result submitted. Only the witness can confirm or reject.
duel.cancellationDesc: PROPOSED/ACCEPTED: only the duelists (challenger or opponent) can cancel. IN_PROGRESS/AWAITING_VALIDATION: only the witness can cancel. No score is applied.
duel.expirationDesc: If the opponent does not accept within 30 minutes, the duel expires automatically. A warning is sent to participants when 10 minutes remain.
duel.callout: See the complete flow with all phases on the <flowLink>Duel Flow</flowLink> page.

witness.title: Witness
witness.description: The witness system ensures result integrity. A third player, defined at duel creation, confirms who won.
items: The witness is defined by the challenger at the time of duel creation via /duel @opponent format @witness
The witness does not need to accept the duel — they only participate in the result validation phase
After a result is submitted, the duel enters AWAITING_VALIDATION
Only the witness can confirm or reject the result
If the witness confirms: the duel is finalized atomically
If the witness rejects: the duel returns to IN_PROGRESS and the result is cleared
ruleItems: The witness is mandatory in all duels
The witness cannot be one of the duelists
The witness cannot be a bot
The witness can cancel the duel in the IN_PROGRESS and AWAITING_VALIDATION phases
witness.notificationsDesc: The witness receives an automatic DM when the duel is created and when a result is submitted for validation. If the DM fails, the bot falls back to a channel mention.
witness.callout: The witness is also automatically registered as a player if it is their first time participating in a duel.

ranking.title: Ranking
ranking.description: The ranking shows players ordered by points within the active season. Each season has its own independent ranking.
items: Simple scoring: +1 per win, -1 per loss
Each season has its own independent ranking via PlayerSeason
New season = score reset for everyone
20 players per page with button navigation
Players with the same points, wins and peak streak share the same position (e.g.: 1, 1, 3 — next skips)
ranking.leaderboardDesc: The /rank command shows the current season ranking with medals for the top 3:
relatedItems: /rank [page] — Paginated ranking of the current season
/mvp — Top 3 players (podium) with Peak Streak highlight
/records — Season records (highest streak, best win rate, most duels)
ranking.callout: Use /profile to see your own statistics, including ranking position, points, win rate and streaks.

antiFarm.title: Anti-farm
antiFarm.description: To prevent score abuse, there is a simple rule: the same player pair can only have 1 confirmed duel per day (UTC).
antiFarm.ruleDesc: If Player A and Player B already had a confirmed duel today, any new challenge between them (in either direction) will be blocked. The cooldown resets at midnight UTC.
antiFarm.creationCooldownDesc: 30 seconds between duel creations per user.
antiFarm.buttonDebounceDesc: 5 seconds cooldown on action buttons to prevent double clicks.
antiFarm.notifCooldownDesc: 5 minutes per user per event type for anti-spam.
validationItems: There must be an active season
Opponent and witness cannot be bots
Witness cannot be one of the duelists
Neither duelist can have another active duel
The same pair cannot have more than 1 confirmed duel per day
antiFarm.implementationDesc: The cooldown is implemented with an in-memory key-based Map. It accepts loss on restart (the cooldown is reset). The daily anti-farm is checked in the database, ensuring persistence even after restarts.
antiFarm.callout: Cooldown parameters are configurable in src/config.ts. See the Configuration page for details.

userCommands.title: User Commands
userCommands.duelDesc: Challenges a player to a ranked duel.
userCommands.rankDesc: Shows the current season ranking with 20 players per page.
userCommands.mvpDesc: Shows the 3 best players of the current season (podium) with Peak Streak highlight.
userCommands.profileDesc: Shows a player's compact profile with ranking position, points, wins, losses, win rate, streaks and seasons played.
userCommands.historyDesc: Shows duel history and statistics in the current season. Shows the last 10 confirmed duels.
userCommands.h2hDesc: Shows the direct matchup between two players in the current season.
userCommands.activityDesc: Shows the 10 most active players of the current season (by total duels played).
userCommands.recordsDesc: Shows current season records: highest streak, best win rate (minimum 5 games) and most duels.
userCommands.seasonDesc: Shows current season status with partial top 3, dates and remaining days.
userCommands.pendingDesc: Shows duels that need your action, ordered by urgency. Ephemeral response (only you see it).
userCommands.helpDesc: Shows a quick bot guide with command list, duel flow, rules and link to the documentation.
userCommands.settingsDesc: Configures your notification preferences. By default, DMs are enabled.
userCommands.callout: All commands use Discord slash commands. Start typing / in chat.

adminCommands.title: Admin Commands
adminCommands.description: Commands restricted to users with roles listed in ADMIN_ROLE_IDS. All actions are recorded in the persistent audit log.
adminCommands.warning: These commands require one of the admin roles configured in ADMIN_ROLE_IDS. The original duel embed is automatically updated when possible.
adminCommands.cancelDesc: Force cancels a duel. Duel cannot be in a terminal state (CONFIRMED, CANCELLED, EXPIRED).

cancelParams.name: duel_id
cancelParams.description: ID of the duel to cancel

adminCommands.reopenDesc: Reopens a duel in terminal state to IN_PROGRESS. If the duel was CONFIRMED, reverts player points/wins/losses.

reopenParams.name: duel_id
reopenParams.description: ID of the duel to reopen

adminCommands.forceExpireDesc: Forces expiration of a non-terminal duel.

forceExpireParams.name: duel_id
forceExpireParams.description: ID of the duel to expire

adminCommands.fixResultDesc: Fixes the result of an already confirmed duel. Reverts old result points and applies new ones in an atomic transaction.

fixResultParams.name: duel_id
fixResultParams.description: ID of the duel to fix

adminCommands.logsDesc: Shows the admin action history for a duel (date, action, status transition, admin and reason).
adminCommands.seasonStatusDesc: Shows active season info: number, name, dates, remaining days, total duels and active players.
adminCommands.seasonEndDesc: Manually ends the active season. Cancels non-finalized duels, calculates podium, defines champion and sends public embed.
adminCommands.seasonCreateDesc: Creates a new season. There cannot be another active season.
adminCommands.seasonRepairDesc: Recalculates season stats from confirmed duels (recovery use).

seasonRepairParams.name: season_id
seasonRepairParams.description: ID of the season to repair

adminCommands.searchPlayerDesc: Searches the last 15 duels of a player (as challenger, opponent or witness).
adminCommands.searchStatusDesc: Searches the last 15 duels in a specific status.

searchStatusParams.name: status
searchStatusParams.description: PROPOSED, ACCEPTED, IN_PROGRESS, AWAITING_VALIDATION, CONFIRMED, CANCELLED, EXPIRED

duelFlow.title: Duel Flow
duelFlow.description: A duel goes through 5 phases. Everything happens within a single embed that is updated in-place on Discord.
duelFlow.phase1Desc: Player A uses /duel @PlayerB MD1 @Witness. Yellow embed with acceptance status. The opponent has 30 minutes to accept. Buttons: Accept Duel | Cancel.
duelFlow.phase2Desc: Opponent accepted. Blue embed. Either duelist can start. Buttons: Start Duel | Cancel.
duelFlow.phase3Desc: Duel started. Orange embed. Only the witness can report the result. MD1: automatic result (1-0). MD3: modal asking for score (2-0 or 2-1). Only the witness can cancel. Buttons: Report Result | Cancel.
duelFlow.phase4Desc: Result submitted. Purple embed. Only the witness can interact. If confirms: duel finalized atomically. If rejects: returns to IN_PROGRESS. Buttons: Confirm Result | Reject Result | Cancel.
duelFlow.phase5Desc: Green embed, no buttons. Shows final score. Scoring applied: +1 point for winner, -1 for loser. Streaks updated.
duelFlow.expiredDesc: Opponent did not accept within 30 minutes. The bot checks every 1 minute. Warning sent when 10 minutes remain.
duelFlow.cancelledDesc: PROPOSED/ACCEPTED: only duelists can cancel. IN_PROGRESS/AWAITING_VALIDATION: only the witness can cancel. No score is applied.
duelFlow.notifCallout: Automatic DMs with fallback to channel mention. Anti-spam: 5-minute cooldown per user per event type. Opt-out via /settings notifications off.
